title: Recall Potion
description: Bring two iconic Terraria items to Minecraft!
body:
![Main Image](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/9p7f1kyo7sz7de92r637q/datapack_presentation_recallp_v2.png?rlkey=9v1rau8yq83xg1zf5z6p9tkw2&st=psktpqib&dl=1)
_(Edited promotional image, does not work the same in-game)_

## Features 🔥

- Completely **multiplayer friendly**.
- Original **textures** and **sounds** from **Terraria**!

### Recall Potion 🧪

By drinking this potion, you will be teleported to the **last bed** where you **saved your spawnpoint**.

- The potion can **only be used once** and **cannot be craftable**.
- It teleports you almost **instantly**.
- You can only stack **one** at a time.

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Recall Potion Example](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/birzzgikomthu8t00hq03/recall-potion-test.gif?rlkey=eqhbtaqjj7gaekcmzwzachj5z&st=rf19axwu&dl=1)

</details>

Once you have teleported, you will receive the following potion effects for a short period of time: _(To ensure safe teleportation)_

- Resistance **X** for **5** seconds.
- Fire Resistance for **30** seconds.
- Slow Falling for **5** seconds.

### Magic Mirror 🪞

It works exactly like the potion, but has **infinite uses**. It has a **one second cooldown** before teleporting.

<details>
<summary>Example GIF</summary>

![Magic Mirror Example](https://www.dropbox.com/scl/fi/dpoq9ac29us23fhhtbj9g/magic-mirror-test.gif?rlkey=bcsiig3sxace9ddla0en6i8ga&st=gfjzra2l&dl=1)

</details>

## Where to find them ❓

These items appear in almost every chest in vanilla structures of minecraft with a low probability _(The mirror is the rarest of all!)_, here is a list:

- Woodland Mansion
- Underwater Ruin (Big)
- Stronghold Library
- Stronghold Corridor
- Simple Dungeon (The structure that has a spawner in the center.)
- Shipwreck Supply
- Pillager Outpost
- Nether Fortress Bridge
- Jungle Temple
- Igloo
- End City Treasure
- Desert Pyramid
- Bastion Treasure
- Bastion Other (A normal bastion chest)
- Ancient City
- Abandoned mineshaft
- Village Cartographer
- Village Weaponsmith
- Village Temple

_(A video of the first version of the datapack)_
